headline: NiSource (NI) Stock May Be 24% Overvalued On Dividend Value
summary: NiSource stock has delivered a strong 119.2% return over the past five years, yet its current valuation picture is mixed, with the Dividend Discount Model (DDM) pointing to a premium to intrinsic value while market multiples suggest the shares are roughly in line with peers. At the same time, NiSource carries a low overall value score, which raises the question of how much of that long run-up is already reflected in the price.
